_comment_1: Build-time configuration for the Flutter app. Copy this file to dart_defines.json (gitignored) and fill in the real values. Then run: flutter run --dart-define-from-file=dart_defines.json
_comment_2: These keys are baked into the compiled app at build time. Changing a value here means rebuilding (not hot-reloading) the app to pick it up.
_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY_help: Google Cloud project API key with Static Maps API enabled. Used by the Explore page for the static-map preview. Without it, the page shows a placeholder card.
_GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID_help: OAuth 2.0 Web client id (NOT Android client id). The backend's JWKS verifier accepts ID tokens minted by this client. Leave blank to disable Google Sign-In on Android.
